command: $ports = @(3005, 3010, 9000); foreach ($port in $ports) { $pids = (netstat -ano | findstr ":$port"); foreach ($line in $pids) { $pid_val = $line.Split(' ', [System.StringSplitOptions]::RemoveEmptyEntries)[-1]; if ($pid_val -ne '0') { Stop-Process -Id $pid_val -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Start-Sleep 1; cd api; Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run start:dev' -WindowStyle Minimized; cd ../frontend; Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run dev' -WindowStyle Minimized
